name: Favorite Chili Macaroni
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 ounces canned no-added-salt whole tomatoes, undrained and chopped
15 ounces canned kidney beans, rinsed and drained
8 3/4 ounces canned no-added-salt whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
This is a classic, family-pleasing recipe that uses kidney beans to extend the ground beef and lower the fat content.
1. Cook ground beef, onion, bell peppers, and garlic in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat until browned, stirring to crumble beef. Drain well; wipe drippings from pan with paper towels. Return beef mixture to pan.
2. Add all remaining ingredients except cheese, and stir well. Bring to a boil.
3. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Spoon into individual serving plates; top with cheese.
